/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/balltest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/balltest.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/balltest.dir/src/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/balltest.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/balltest.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/balltest.dir/src/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/balltest.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/balltest.dir/src/engine.cpp.o -o balltest  libglad.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.4 -lassimp -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
